summary: Crystal‑clear soundboard recording with balanced mix, highlighted by a peppy La Bamba and a heartfelt Morning Dew.
review: The SBD capture is praised as one of the best‑sounding tapes on Archive, sounding louder yet more balanced and clear than most. Musically the show is solid and fun – the band jokes with a Rocky & Bullwinkle intro, slips in a surprising Jerry‑led La Bamba within Good Lovin', and delivers a moving Morning Dew, though few other moments stand out.

ai_rating.rationale: Recording quality is consistently described as excellent; the performance is decent with a couple of standout songs, leading to an overall strong but not legendary rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Balanced and clear mix, slightly louder than usual, described as beautiful, crisp and the best‑sounding SBD by multiple reviewers.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Upbeat and playful set with a quirky Rocky & Bullwinkle intro, a fun La Bamba interlude inside Good Lovin', and an emotionally resonant Morning Dew; overall enjoyable despite limited major peaks.

band_member_comments.Jerry: His vocal performance on La Bamba is highlighted as a fantastic surprise.
